summary: Iteration 124: Three bug fixes verified - (1) Expense category filter now uses case-insensitive startsWith matching, (2) Delete time limit disabled for admin, (3) Partner salary accepts custom date parameter. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend expense filter verified working.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. This is a React/HTML nesting warning that should be fixed for proper HTML semantics (pre-existing from iteration 123).

critical_code_review_comments: HTML table structure warning persists in ExpensesPage.jsx - consider using React.Fragment instead of span wrappers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) applySearchFilters in AdvancedSearch.jsx uses case-insensitive startsWith matching at lines 301-304. (2) access_policies.py has delete_time_limit_enabled which can be set to false via PUT /api/access-policies. (3) partners.py pay-salary endpoint accepts 'date' parameter at lines 231-237. Frontend expense filters auto-apply when selecting dropdown options.

expense_filter_case_insensitive.test_case: Category 'Salary' filter matches both 'salary' and 'Salary' entries
expense_filter_case_insensitive.details: Filter showed 11 salary-related expenses when 'Salary' selected due to case-insensitive startsWith match

expense_filter_startswith_match.details: Filter showed 24 entries matching both 'Supplier' and 'Supplier Purchase' categories

delete_time_limit_disabled.test_case: Admin can delete expenses older than 24 hours
delete_time_limit_disabled.details: delete_time_limit_enabled is False in access_policies, admin bypass works

partner_salary_custom_date.test_case: Custom 'date' parameter is used for expense record
partner_salary_custom_date.details: Salary payment created with date '2026-01-15' as specified in request body

expense_date_format_no_z.test_case: Date without Z suffix stores correctly
expense_date_format_no_z.details: Date '2026-03-10T14:30:00' stored correctly without UTC conversion issues

sale_date_format_no_z.test_case: Date without Z suffix stores correctly
